Title: Path Traversal Vulnerability in SessionStart_handoff_restore.py
Impact: Attacker could overwrite arbitrary files
Remediation: Use pathlib.Path.resolve() with strict=True to validate paths

Title: Insufficient Input Validation in HandoffStore
Impact: File system operations could target unintended directories
Remediation: Validate terminal_id format (regex: ^term_[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$)

Title: Race Condition in File Locking
Impact: Concurrent compaction could corrupt task tracker files
Remediation: Use platform-specific file locking (fcntl.flock on Unix, msvcrt.locking on Windows)

Title: Checksum Comparison Timing Attack
Impact: Remote attacker could forge valid checksums
Remediation: Use hmac.compare_digest() for constant-time comparison

Title: Inefficient File Search in SessionStart
Impact: Session startup could take several seconds
Remediation: Maintain manifest file indexing active_session tasks

Title: Repeated JSON Serialization in Quality Scoring
Impact: Unnecessary CPU overhead during compaction
Remediation: Cache serialized JSON or calculate size incrementally

Title: No Pagination for Large Lists
Impact: High memory usage for thousands of modifications
Remediation: Use itertools.islice() for lazy loading

Title: Inconsistent Error Handling
Impact: Unhandled exceptions could crash compaction
Remediation: Catch Exception broadly and log specific types

Title: Magic Numbers Without Constants
Impact: Difficult to maintain consistent behavior
Remediation: Define all config values in central config module

Title: Missing Type Hints in Public APIs
Impact: Reduced IDE support and type safety
Remediation: Add comprehensive type hints to all public APIs

Title: Missing Security Tests for Path Traversal
Impact: Security vulnerabilities could go undetected
Remediation: Add test suite for input validation covering path traversal

Title: No Concurrency Tests
Impact: Race conditions could corrupt data in production
Remediation: Add integration tests using multiprocessing

Title: Missing Edge Case Tests for Checksum Validation
Impact: Invalid checksums could be accepted
Remediation: Add comprehensive checksum validation test cases

Title: No Data Retention Policy Enforcement
Impact: Old handoff data accumulates indefinitely
Remediation: Implement automatic cleanup on compaction

Title: No Audit Trail for Handoff Access
Impact: Unable to investigate data breaches
Remediation: Add structured logging for all handoff operations

Title: Missing Privacy Controls
Impact: Sensitive data could be exposed in logs
Remediation: Implement sensitive data detection and redaction

Title: Silent Failures in Schema Validation
Impact: Users don't know when handoff restoration fails
Remediation: Log failures at WARNING level and output user-visible message

Title: Inadequate Error Messages
Impact: Users struggle to debug validation failures
Remediation: Include field name, current value, valid range in error messages

Title: No Validation of Handoff Data Completeness
Impact: Handoffs with missing critical data get saved
Remediation: Add validation rules for data quality

Title: Root Cause: File Locking Implementation Flaw
Impact: Data corruption under concurrent compaction
Remediation: Use platform-specific mandatory locking or SQLite

Title: Root Cause: Checksum Algorithm Choice
Impact: Compaction takes longer than necessary
Remediation: Use xxhash or similar fast non-cryptographic hash

Title: Root Cause: Transcript Parsing Performance
Impact: High memory usage for large transcripts
Remediation: Use ijson streaming JSON parser
